contact_body: Press, partnerships, guest pitches, listener questions, all welcome.

values.title: No sponsored advice.
values.body: We take show sponsorships. We do not take product sponsorships disguised as advice. Ever.

values.title: Inconvenient first.
values.body: If the truth is uncomfortable, we lead with it. If the comfortable thing is wrong, we say so.

values.title: Math beats vibes.
values.body: Every claim on the show has a number behind it. Or it doesn't get said.

contact_heading: Want to be on the show?

host.name: Bhartendra Singh
host.tagline: One podcast, one job: to make money make sense.

story_paragraphs: Most of us have a money problem that no one names clearly. We're told to save, then told what to save in, often by people whose income depends on us picking the wrong thing. The advice is loud, the conflicts are quiet, and the cost is decades of compounding quietly lost, usually by those who can least afford it.

ThisOrThat with Bhartendra began in 2025, with a single conversation with Mrin Agarwal. Every episode since has chased the same objective: talk about money with clarity, candour, and the willingness to ask the questions that actually matter to us.

If the show has one goal, it's this: that every listener learns to think about money, investing, and their own behaviour with clarity, purpose, and confidence. Money shapes so much of our lives; it deserves that kind of attention.
